title: Deduplicate focus and add one info line per target
desc: When find returns multiple targets, print the focused leaf only once for the whole invocation because it is shared context. Then print one compact # INFO line per target with the window title so users get one additional high-signal detail without bloating the grap string output.
steps: Print one shared # FOCUS line per find invocation.
Print one # TARGET line per match.
Print one compact # INFO title line under each target.
author: claude
